name: Ipamorelin
purpose: Selective ghrelin mimetic that triggers pulsatile growth hormone release without significantly raising cortisol or prolactin.

name: CJC-1295 (no DAC)
purpose: Short-acting GHRH analog that amplifies endogenous GH pulses; pairs synergistically with GHRPs.

name: CJC-1295 with DAC
purpose: Long-acting GHRH analog (~7 day half-life) producing sustained elevation of GH/IGF-1.

name: Ipamorelin + CJC-1295
purpose: Gold-standard pairing: GHRH analog amplifies the natural pulse, GHRP triggers release.

name: Tesamorelin
purpose: Stabilized GHRH (FDA-approved) with strong visceral fat reduction profile.

name: Sermorelin
purpose: First-generation GHRH(1-29) producing gentler GH pulse amplification.

name: Hexarelin
purpose: Potent GHRP with strong GH-release action; rapid receptor desensitization with continuous use.

name: MK-677 (Ibutamoren)
purpose: Non-peptide ghrelin receptor agonist with long half-life; orally bioavailable.

name: GHK-Cu
purpose: Copper tripeptide with skin remodeling, hair growth, and broad regenerative effects.

name: BPC-157
purpose: Body Protective Compound — broad cytoprotective, angiogenic, tendon-healing peptide.

name: TB-500 (Thymosin Beta-4)
purpose: Actin-binding peptide promoting cellular migration, tissue repair, inflammation modulation.

name: BPC-157 + TB-500
purpose: Synergistic systemic healing: BPC-157 daily + TB-500 twice weekly.

name: Thymosin Alpha-1
purpose: Endogenous immunomodulator promoting T-cell maturation and Th1 immune balance.

name: Epitalon
purpose: Synthetic pineal tetrapeptide; may upregulate telomerase and restore circadian melatonin rhythm.

name: MOTS-c
purpose: Mitochondrial-derived peptide that activates AMPK and modulates metabolic homeostasis.

name: SS-31 (Elamipretide)
purpose: Cardiolipin-stabilizing peptide protecting inner mitochondrial membrane integrity.

name: NAD+ (injectable)
purpose: Coenzyme essential for sirtuin activation, redox balance, mitochondrial energy.

name: Semax
purpose: ACTH(4-10) analog with neuroprotective and BDNF-modulating effects.

name: Selank
purpose: Tuftsin analog with anxiolytic, immunomodulatory, gentle cognitive effects.

name: Tirzepatide
purpose: Dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist for glucose control and significant weight reduction.

name: Semaglutide
purpose: Long-acting GLP-1 receptor agonist for type-2 diabetes and obesity.

name: Retatrutide (3RT)
purpose: Triple agonist (GLP-1 / GIP / glucagon) with the strongest weight-loss data.

name: Cagrilintide
purpose: Long-acting amylin analog enhancing satiety; pairs with GLP-1 agonists.

name: Melanotan II
purpose: Melanocortin receptor agonist increasing eumelanin (tan) with libido side effects.

name: PT-141 (Bremelanotide)
purpose: Melanocortin agonist for libido and sexual function (FDA-approved as Vyleesi).

name: KPV
purpose: Tripeptide derived from α-MSH with anti-inflammatory effects.

name: DSIP
purpose: Delta Sleep-Inducing Peptide; may improve sleep architecture and pain modulation.

name: Humanin
purpose: Mitochondrial-derived peptide with broad metabolic, neuroprotective, and cardiovascular effects.

name: HGH Frag 176-191
purpose: GH C-terminal fragment promoting fat oxidation without raising IGF-1 or affecting glucose.

name: ACE-031
purpose: Soluble activin receptor type IIB that inhibits myostatin pathway for muscle growth.

name: Follistatin
purpose: Glycoprotein that binds and inhibits myostatin, promoting strong muscle growth.

name: Cerebrolysin
purpose: Porcine brain-derived neurotrophic factors mixture; massively boosts BDNF.

name: PE-22-28
purpose: Spadin analog with antidepressant and neuroprotective effects via TREK-1 inhibition.

name: FOXO4-DRI
purpose: Senolytic peptide that selectively triggers apoptosis in senescent cells.

name: Thymalin
purpose: Thymus extract bioregulator; regenerates the thymus gland and boosts immune cells.

name: VIP
purpose: Vasoactive Intestinal Peptide; lowers BP, modulates inflammation, supports cognition.

name: LL-37
purpose: Cathelicidin antimicrobial peptide with broad antibacterial/antifungal activity.

name: Kisspeptin-10
purpose: Neuropeptide that triggers GnRH release; supports HPG axis function.

name: Oxytocin
purpose: Bonding hormone with effects on social cognition, mood, and sexual response.

name: Cartalax
purpose: Cartilage tissue bioregulator; supports joint and connective tissue repair.

name: Pielotax
purpose: Kidney tissue bioregulator (oral capsules); supports renal function.

name: Svetinorm
purpose: Liver tissue bioregulator (oral); supports hepatic function and detox.

name: Ventfort
purpose: Vascular tissue bioregulator (oral); supports blood vessel and endothelial health.

name: Vilon
purpose: Immune tissue bioregulator (short peptide); supports immunity.

name: Hepatamin
purpose: Liver organ-derived bioregulator (oral capsules).

name: Reini Salman
purpose: Kidney bioregulator (alternative oral formulation).

name: 5-Amino-1MQ
purpose: NNMT inhibitor (small molecule) that boosts SAM and NAD+ for fat loss and metabolism.

name: SLU-PP-332
purpose: ERR (estrogen-related receptor) agonist (small molecule); exercise mimetic.

name: HCG
purpose: Human Chorionic Gonadotropin; mimics LH to maintain testicular function during TRT or restart natural production.

name: Dihexa
purpose: Hepatocyte growth factor analog; nootropic with strong synaptogenic effects.

name: ARA-290 (Cibinetide)
purpose: EPO-derived peptide for neuropathic pain and anti-inflammatory effects.

name: Pinealon
purpose: Tripeptide bioregulator targeting pineal function and circadian rhythm.

name: AOD9604
purpose: Modified GH fragment (176-191) for fat oxidation without IGF-1 elevation.

name: Adamax
purpose: Russian short peptide bioregulator (Lys-Glu-Asp-Trp); cognitive and prostate support.

name: Wolverine (BPC + TB)
purpose: Stack: BPC-157 + TB-500 for systemic recovery and tissue repair.

name: KLOW Stack (GHK/KPV/BPC/TB)
purpose: Premium stack: GHK-Cu, KPV, BPC-157, TB-500 for skin/hair/tissue.

name: GLOW Stack (GHK/BPC/TB)
purpose: Stack: GHK-Cu + BPC-157 + TB-500 for skin glow and tissue repair.

name: FIT Stack (CJC + Ipa)
purpose: Stack: CJC-1295 (no DAC) + Ipamorelin for pulsatile GH.

name: Coremend Blend (KPV/BPC/TB)
purpose: Stack: KPV + BPC-157 + TB-500 for gut and tissue healing.

name: PE-22-28 + Pinealon + Selank
purpose: Cognitive blend: PE-22-28 (focus) + Pinealon (circadian) + Selank (calm).

name: IGF-1 LR3
purpose: Long-acting IGF-1 analogue (~20-30h); direct anabolic signaling — muscle hyperplasia/hypertrophy, nutrient partitioning.

name: LGD-4033 (Ligandrol)
purpose: Oral SARM — selective androgen receptor agonist; muscle/strength with less androgenic effect than testosterone.

name: J-147
purpose: Curcumin-derived neuroprotective; targets mitochondrial ATP synthase, enhances neurogenesis. Strong Alzheimer's/aging preclinical data.

name: ATX-304
purpose: Direct pan-AMPK activator (oral); fat oxidation, insulin sensitivity, mitochondrial signaling — exercise mimetic.

name: FLRG242
purpose: Follistatin-based myostatin inhibitor; muscle growth via myostatin/activin neutralization. More selective than ActRIIB traps (skips BMP9/10 vascular toxicity).

name: Melanotan I
purpose: MC1R-selective melanocortin — tanning + UV photoprotection via melanin. Minimal MC4R (little libido/nausea vs MT-2).

name: Orexin-A
purpose: Wakefulness/arousal neuropeptide (intranasal); daytime alertness, focus, mood.

name: Noopept
purpose: Fast-acting nootropic (intranasal); raises BDNF/NGF, focus and memory.

name: Adalank
purpose: Selank-type anxiolytic analogue (intranasal); calm, immune, mild cognitive.

name: Neurolux (Semax+Selank+Pinealon+PE22-28)
purpose: Comprehensive cognitive blend: N-Acetyl-Semax 20mg + N-Acetyl-Selank 8mg + Pinealon 10mg + PE22-28 10mg. Focus + calm + circadian in one.

name: Tadalafil
purpose: PDE5 inhibitor; vascular/endothelial benefit, erectile function, BPH. Low-dose daily.

name: Anastrozole
purpose: Aromatase inhibitor — blocks testosterone→estradiol conversion. Manages high E2 on TRT.

name: Testosterone
purpose: Primary androgen — anabolic/androgenic baseline. TRT foundation.

name: Finasteride
purpose: 5α-reductase inhibitor — blocks T→DHT. Hair-loss Rx.

name: 9-Me-BC
purpose: Dopaminergic/neurogenic nootropic; dopamine receptor sensitization, neuroprotection.

name: L-Carnitine
purpose: Mitochondrial fatty-acid transport; fat oxidation, energy. (ALCAR variant crosses BBB for cognition.)
avoid: High-dose oral (TMAO via gut FMO3 — injectable/ALCAR preferred)

name: L-Glutathione
purpose: Master antioxidant; detox, immune, skin. Note: SubQ/IM largely degraded by γ-GT — IV is the effective route.
